_description: Enhanced test with fraud patterns, oracle health, and prefetched data

patterns.name: Flash Loan Attack
patterns.description: Transaction exhibits patterns consistent with flash loan exploitation
indicators: Large value in flash loan context: 100 ETH
patterns.recommendation: Block immediately. Flash loan attacks can drain protocol funds.

patterns.name: Price Manipulation

patterns.recommendation: Block immediately. Price manipulation can cause mass liquidations.
